easy.title: Flex Sum (*args)
easy.description: Write `sum_all(*args)` returning sum of all numbers passed.
hints: args is a tuple of inputs

medium.title: HTML Tag Generator (**kwargs)
medium.description: Write `make_tag(tag, content, **attrs)` returning HTML string e.g. `Click`.

hard.title: Strict Type Enforcer Decorator
hard.description: Write decorator verifying keyword args match target types.
hints: Inspect kwargs and check isinstance against spec

debugging.title: Fix Default Parameter Order Bug
debugging.description: Fix SyntaxError in function header parameter order.
